title: Immortal Love
actors: Hideko Takamine, Keiji Sada, Tatsuya Nakadai
plot: A young woman is forced by circumstance into a loveless marriage while still in love with another. This episodic tale follows their story through three decades of bitter conflict which engulfs their children and those around them.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 1 nomination total
